Description: Requested loan amount by the borrower
Number of months for the loan (36 or 60)
Annual interest rate for the loan
Monthly payment if the loan originates
LendingClub credit grade (A–G)
LendingClub subgrade (A1, A2, etc.)
Borrower’s job title provided at application
Length of employment in years
Borrower’s home ownership status
Borrower’s annual income (self-reported)
Whether income was verified by LendingClub
Date when the loan was issued (month/year)
Current status of the loan (paid, charged-off, etc.)
Borrower-stated purpose for the loan
Loan title provided by the borrower
First three digits of borrower’s ZIP code
State listed by the borrower
Debt-to-income ratio: monthly debts / income
Month of borrower’s earliest credit line
Number of open credit lines
Number of derogatory public records
Total revolving credit balance
Percent of revolving credit currently used
Total number of credit lines in borrower’s file
Initial listing status of the loan (W or F)
Individual or joint application
Number of mortgage accounts
Number of public record bankruptcies
